name: Green Tomato Chutney (Lesem)
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds green tomatoes, diced into half-inch pieces
1/2 pound tart green apples, peeled, cored, and diced
6 dried red chili peppers, 1 inch long each (broken)
or 1 teaspoon dried crushed red pepper
1 ½ teaspoons garlic, minced (about 3 medium cloves)
2 pounds shallots, peeled (or peeled pickling onions) – halved if large
3 medium onions, diced into half-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a wide 4-quart saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil quickly and adjust the heat so it boils gently for about 30 minutes, or until thickened to the consistency of jam.
3. Stir occasionally to prevent sticking.
4. Spoon into hot, sterilized half-pint jars and seal.
5. Let stand at least one month before consuming.
If a less spicy product is desired, remove some seeds from the dried chiles before adding them to the mixture.
Yield: Approximately 6 ½ cups.
